title: flyback
description: The description of a Flyback converter excitation

inputVoltage.description: The input voltage of the flyback

diodeVoltageDrop.description: The voltage drop on the diode

maximumDrainSourceVoltage.description: The maximum drain-source voltage in the selected switch

maximumDutyCycle.description: The maximum duty cycle in the selected switch

currentRippleRatio.description: The maximum current ripple allowed in the output

flybackModes.description: The conduction mode of the Flyback
flybackModes.title: flybackModes

flybackOperatingPoint.description: The description of one flyback operating point. Flyback does not require switchingFrequency at the schema level: when omitted, it is inferred from the conduction mode, see docs/inputs.md.
flybackOperatingPoint.title: flybackOperatingPoint

outputVoltages.description: List of output voltages, one per output. Interpreted per outputVoltagesType (default: dc).

outputVoltagesType.description: Type of value carried in outputVoltages. Defaults to dc.

outputCurrents.description: List of output currents, one per output. Interpreted per outputCurrentsType (default: dc).

outputCurrentsType.description: Type of value carried in outputCurrents. Defaults to dc.

switchingFrequency.description: Switching frequency of the operating point. Unit: Hz. Optional for flyback when mode is supplied.

mode.description: The conduction mode of the operating point.

ambientTemperature.description: Ambient temperature of the operating point. Unit: Celsius.
